description.value: Aura moderate conjuration; CL 8th; Slot none; Price 29,600 gp; Weight 5 lbs. DESCRIPTION This white ash staff is decorated with inlaid silver runes. It allows use of the following spells: Cure serious wounds (1 charge) Lesser restoration (1 charge) Remove blindness/deafness (2 charges) Remove disease (3 charges) CONSTRUCTION REQUIREMENTS Craft Staff, cure serious wounds, lesser restoration, remove blindness/deafness, remove disease; Cost 14,800 gp.
